pages.title: Fisher
pages.text: Tide-mod tackle. Forty-six items. Mod-original recipes preserved; the class is the only delta. Bait stays open to all.

pages.title: Rods
pages.text: $(bold)Stone, Iron, Golden, Diamond, Crystal Fishing Rods.$(/) Five tiers.$(br2)Netherite and Midas rods stay smithing-table upgrades from these bases.

pages.title: Line and hook
pages.text: $(bold)Lines.$(/) Fishing Line, Braided Line, Golden Line, Reinforced Line.$(br2)$(bold)Hooks.$(/) Fishing Hook, Iron, Lavaproof, Void.

pages.title: Storage and bobbers
pages.text: $(bold)Fish Satchel, Fish Display.$(/) Stowage and presentation.$(br2)$(bold)33 bobbers.$(/) The white base plus dye variants, metallic variants (gold/iron/diamond/netherite/amethyst/echo/pearl/chorus), and specials (apple, golden apple, enchanted, feather, duck, grassy, lichen, heart, nautilus). Color variants are dye recipes from the base.$(br2)Matching trader: the Fisherman.
